locations.name: Peterlee Police Station
locations.address:
Peterlee Police Station
St Aidans Way,
County Durham
SR8 1QR

description: The neighbourhood police team works closely with the local community to keep the area safe and peaceful. We focus on preventing crime, tackling local issues, and building strong relationships with residents. Our duties often include patrolling the area, supporting vulnerable individuals, working with schools and local groups, and responding to concerns raised by the community. We do this by being visible and approachable.
